all.en: The whole office was decorated with twinkling lights and shiny silver ornaments.
all.zh: 整個辦公室都掛滿閃爍的燈飾和亮晶晶的銀色飾品。

all.en: Everyone showed up in festive sweaters, some uglier than others on purpose.
all.zh: 大家都穿著節慶毛衣前來，有些人還故意穿得特別醜。

all.en: The buffet table was loaded with roast chicken, dumplings, and homemade cookies.
all.zh: 自助餐桌上擺滿了烤雞、餃子和自製餅乾。

all.en: Our boss gave a short speech to thank everyone for a hardworking year.
all.zh: 老闆發表了一段簡短的演說，感謝大家辛苦工作了一年。

all.en: He then announced surprise bonuses, which made the room erupt in cheers.
all.zh: 他接著宣布意外的年終獎金，全場頓時歡呼起來。

all.en: We played a Secret Santa game, and I received a quirky coffee mug.
all.zh: 我們玩了交換禮物遊戲，我收到了一個造型古怪的咖啡杯。

all.en: The accountant, usually quiet, surprised us by singing karaoke very loudly.
all.zh: 平常很安靜的會計，竟然出乎意料地大聲唱起卡拉OK。

all.en: Some coworkers started dancing awkwardly to old pop hits.
all.zh: 幾位同事跟著老流行金曲笨拙地跳起舞來。

all.en: I chatted with people from departments I had never spoken to before.
all.zh: 我和一些從未交談過的部門同事聊起天來。

all.en: The intern won the costume contest with a hilarious reindeer outfit.
all.zh: 實習生憑藉一身爆笑的馴鹿裝贏得了服裝大賽。

all.en: As the night ended, I realized we were more than coworkers; we were a small family.
all.zh: 夜晚結束時，我體會到我們不僅是同事，更像是一個小家庭。
